complex.name: architecture

complex.name: complex-debugging
complex.description: Debugging issues that span multiple files or require deep reasoning

complex.name: review

complex.name: feature-implementation

medium.name: moderate-coding

medium.name: file-modifications

easy.name: simple-question

easy.name: single-file-change
easy.description: Small edits confined to a single file

easy.name: commit
